positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial fauna motif featuring a glowing ethereal lunar moth perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by intricate nebulae and bioluminescent star dust. The design should utilize Art Deco influences blended with cosmic vaporwave aesthetics. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast, making the subject pop against a deep indigo and vibrant sapphire background. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for apparel prints, suitable for single-color linework or spot-color printing, ensuring clean vector edges and graphic impact. The style should resemble a sophisticated zine illustration or detailed engraving, incorporating geometric shapes and flowing organic lines. Cinematic, deep space depth of field, volumetric lighting.
